title: Integration Gate - Campaign Security & Deletion
description: Human verification of the Campaign Security & Deletion epic.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-047' to lock active context
Manually spin up the application stack (frontend and backend)
Perform end-to-end manual testing for Authorization and Deletion
definition_of_done: Human User manually tests the application to confirm the end-to-end data flow and component integration is functional. No formal SCN sign-off is required at this stage.
